name: io.github.ccantynz-alt/gatetest
description: GateTest MCP server — 91-module code quality engine. Scan local repos for security vulnerabilities, reliability issues, code quality bugs, and more. Auto-fix issues with Claude. Nuclear-tier diagnosis explains root cause for every finding. Replaces SonarQube + Snyk + ESLint + 10 others with one unified gate.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Claude API key — enables fix_issue and explain_finding tools (AI-driven auto-fix and Nuclear-tier diagnosis). Optional; scanning tools work without it.
